inputs.label: Initial Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total initial mass of the rocket including propellant.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total initial mass of the rocket including propellant.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Roketin yakıt dahil toplam başlangıç kütlesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Anfangsmasse der Rakete einschließlich Treibstoff.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse initiale totale de la fusée incluant le propergol.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa inicial total del cohete incluyendo el propelente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة الأولية الإجمالية للصاروخ بما في ذلك الوقود.

inputs.label: Final Mass
inputs.businessContext: Final mass after propellant burnout (dry mass).

businessContext_i18n.en: Final mass after propellant burnout (dry mass).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yakıt tükenmesinden sonraki son kütle (kuru kütle).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse finale après épuisement du propergol (masse sèche).
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa final después del agotamiento del propelente (masa seca).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الكتلة النهائية بعد احتراق الوقود (الكتلة الجافة).

inputs.label: Specific Impulse (Isp)
inputs.businessContext: Specific impulse of the rocket engine, a measure of efficiency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Specific impulse of the rocket engine, a measure of efficiency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Roket motorunun özgül itkisi, bir verimlilik ölçüsü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Spezifischer Impuls des Raketentriebwerks, ein Maß für die Effizienz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Impulsion spécifique du moteur-fusée, mesure de l'efficacité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Impulso específico del motor del cohete, una medida de eficiencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الدفع النوعي لمحرك الصاروخ، وهو مقياس للكفاءة.

inputs.label: Gravitational Acceleration
inputs.businessContext: Standard gravitational acceleration at Earth's surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard gravitational acceleration at Earth's surface.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération gravitationnelle standard à la surface terrestre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aceleración gravitacional estándar en la superficie terrestre.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تسارع الجاذبية القياسي على سطح الأرض.

inputs.label: Mass Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: Propellant mass flow rate through the engine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Propellant mass flow rate through the engine.
businessContext_i18n.de: Massenstrom des Treibstoffs durch das Triebwerk.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Débit massique du propergol à travers le moteur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Caudal másico del propelente a través del motor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل تدفق كتلة الوقود عبر المحرك.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
